# LF Property Media

> Real estate photography studio in Sarasota, Florida. Serves real estate agents, developers, and homeowners across Southwest Florida with photos, drone aerials, twilight shoots, cinematic reels, 2D/3D floor plans, and virtual tours — delivered in 24 hours for photos.

Founded 2021 by Locke. FAA Part 107 certified drone pilot. 96% client retention rate. 5+ years of specialization in the Sarasota market.

## Contact

- **Business:** LF Property Media
- **Phone:** (941) 387-5399
- **Email:** l.f.gallery03@gmail.com
- **Location:** Sarasota, FL
- **Service area:** Sarasota, Siesta Key, Lakewood Ranch, Longboat Key, Bird Key, Palmer Ranch, Venice, Osprey, Bradenton, and surrounding Southwest Florida
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 8 AM – 7 PM
- **Instagram:** [@lfpropertymedia](https://www.instagram.com/lfpropertymedia)
- **Facebook:** [lfpropertymedia](https://www.facebook.com/lfpropertymedia)
- **Website:** https://lfpropertymedia.org/

## Packages & Pricing

Full pricing page: https://lfpropertymedia.org/packages.html

Base prices cover homes up to 1,600 sq ft. Add **+$150 per additional 1,000 sq ft** (or any portion thereof) beyond 1,600.

### Signature — $360
- 36 photos total (30 home + 6 drone)
- Short reel (under 30 seconds)
- 2D floor plan
- 24-hour photo delivery
- High-resolution, hand-edited, MLS-ready

### Premier — $550
- 50 photos total (40 home + 10 drone)
- Creative reel on professional camera gear
- 2D floor plans
- 50% off virtual tour ($100 add-on instead of $200)
- Priority 24-hour photo turnaround

### Platinum — $795
- 72 photos total (56 home + 16 drone)
- Scripted professional reel with realtor mic'd up
- 2D floor plan + 3D dollhouse floor plan
- 50% off virtual tour ($100 add-on instead of $200)
- Priority 24-hour photo turnaround

### À la carte
- 10 photos — $100 ($10/photo)
- Drone — $20 per photo, $100 for set of 5
- Creative reel — $300
- Pro video — $425
- Virtual tour — $200 standalone, or $100 with Premier/Platinum

## Services

- [Real estate photography](https://lfpropertymedia.org/services/real-estate-photography.html) — interior, exterior, MLS-ready
- [Drone aerial photography](https://lfpropertymedia.org/services/drone-photography.html) — FAA Part 107 certified
- [Twilight photography](https://lfpropertymedia.org/services/twilight-photography.html) — golden + blue hour blends
- [3D virtual tours and floor plans](https://lfpropertymedia.org/services/3d-tours.html) — interactive dollhouse views

- [Osprey](https://lfpropertymedia.org/areas/osprey.html)

## Credentials & Equipment

- **FAA Part 107** Remote Pilot Certificate (commercial drone operations)
- Professional full-frame camera bodies (Sony)
- Lighting kit for interior flash blends (no AI sky replacement, no synthetic compositing)
- Drone: FAA-compliant for legal commercial aerial work
- 5+ years exclusively in the Sarasota real estate market

## Frequently Asked Questions

Full FAQ: https://lfpropertymedia.org/faq.html

- **Turnaround?** Photos in 24 hours. Video (reels, walkthroughs) takes 3–5 business days due to editing.
- **Drone certified?** Yes — FAA Part 107.
- **Coverage area?** Sarasota plus all of Southwest Florida (Siesta Key, Longboat Key, Bird Key, Lakewood Ranch, Palmer Ranch, Venice, Osprey, Bradenton). Further out available with small travel fee.
- **Cost for typical home?** Signature $360 (up to 1,600 sq ft). Larger homes +$150 per additional 1,000 sq ft.
- **Twilight shoots?** Yes, available à la carte. Multiple-exposure blends, no AI sky replacement.
- **Virtual tours?** Yes — 3D dollhouse tours. Included in Platinum or 50% off with Premier.
- **AI edits?** No. Every file is hand-edited.

## Why Hire LF Property Media

1. **Speed.** 24-hour photo turnaround on every package. Listings don't wait, neither do we.
2. **Transparent pricing.** Packages and square-footage adjustments published on the site — no surprises at invoice.
3. **MLS-ready files.** Correctly sized, color-balanced, named. No re-exports needed.
4. **Licensed drone operations.** FAA Part 107 — legal commercial flight, properly insured.
5. **Real editing.** Hand-edited blends, not AI sky replacements.
6. **Repeat client focus.** 96% of our realtors rebook.
